title: Rotten Tomatoes' 2026 Golden Globes Predictions
text: Awards expert Jacqueline Coley analyzed the competitive landscape of awards season to forecast Golden Globes winners across major categories for the January 11, 2026 ceremony. The article identifies two Warner Bros. frontrunners as primary contenders. Coley predicts One Battle After Another will win Best Comedy/Musical, while Sentimental Value takes Best Drama. She notes these films have been trading the top spot on their awards leaderboard all season. For acting categories, the predictions include: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme) for Best Actor in a Musical/Comedy, Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent) for Best Actor in Drama, Rose Byrne (If I Had Legs I'd Kick You) for Best Actress in Comedy, and Jessie Buckley (Hamnet) for Best Actress in Drama. Jacob Elordi is predicted to win Best Supporting Actor for Frankenstein. Paul Thomas Anderson is predicted to win Best Director for One Battle After Another. Television predictions include Noah Wyle (The Pitt) for Best Drama Actor and Jean Smart (Hacks) for Best Comedy Actress. The limited series Adolescence is forecasted to dominate multiple categories. The article emphasizes unpredictability in the 2025 award season, describing it as reflecting an industry in transition with diverse voting patterns across different organizations.
